# Screencast: Tour the Tray

Goal: introduce relay in 60 seconds. Show the menu bar icon, walk through
the three populated projects, open the settings window.

## Setup

```bash
./scripts/demo.sh --reset
```

## Beat sheet

1. (0:00) Menu bar — point at the relay icon, click to open.
2. (0:08) Pause on the project list: three projects visible (Acme
   Website, Field Notes, Greenhouse Monitor). Read them out.
3. (0:18) Click "Settings" — settings WebView opens.
4. (0:25) Switch to "MCP Servers" tab. Show fs, mac, search.
5. (0:35) Switch to "Services" tab. Show relayLLM (autostart) and
   scheduler (manual).
6. (0:45) Switch to "Projects" tab, open Acme Website. Highlight the
   restricted-tools list as the security boundary.
7. (0:55) Close. Done.
